inputs.label: Flow Velocity
inputs.businessContext: Flow velocity of the fluid relative to the object, in meters per second. Typical aircraft speeds are around 250 m/s.

businessContext_i18n.en: Flow velocity of the fluid relative to the object, in meters per second. Typical aircraft speeds are around 250 m/s.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akışkanın cisme göre akış hızı, metre/saniye cinsinden. Tipik uçak hızları yaklaşık 250 m/s'dir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Strömungsgeschwindigkeit des Fluids relativ zum Objekt, in Metern pro Sekunde. Typische Flugzeuggeschwindigkeiten liegen bei etwa 250 m/s.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse d'écoulement du fluide par rapport à l'objet, en mètres par seconde. Les vitesses typiques d'un avion sont d'environ 250 m/s.

inputs.label: Characteristic Length
inputs.businessContext: Characteristic length of the body (e.g., chord length of an airfoil or diameter of a pipe), in meters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Characteristic length of the body (e.g., chord length of an airfoil or diameter of a pipe), in meters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Cismin karakteristik uzunluğu (ör. kanat profili veter uzunluğu veya boru çapı), metre cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Charakteristische Länge des Körpers (z. B. Sehnenlänge eines Tragflügels oder Durchmesser eines Rohrs), in Metern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur caractéristique du corps (ex. longueur de corde d'un profil aérodynamique ou diamètre d'un tuyau), en mètres.

inputs.label: Kinematic Viscosity
inputs.businessContext: Kinematic viscosity of the fluid. For air at sea level conditions (15°C), this is approximately 1.5 × 10⁻⁵ m²/s.

businessContext_i18n.en: Kinematic viscosity of the fluid. For air at sea level conditions (15°C), this is approximately 1.5 × 10⁻⁵ m²/s.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akışkanın kinematik viskozitesi. Deniz seviyesi koşullarında (15°C) hava için yaklaşık 1.5 × 10⁻⁵ m²/s'dir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kinematische Viskosität des Fluids. Für Luft unter Meeresbedingungen (15 °C) beträgt sie etwa 1,5 × 10⁻⁵ m²/s.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Viscosité cinématique du fluide. Pour l'air au niveau de la mer (15 °C), elle est d'environ 1,5 × 10⁻⁵ m²/s.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
